cloudToggle.cloudDesc: Use Pro for bigger files, OCR, Office, AI, and longer jobs.
cloudToggle.lockedDesc: Pro unlocks bigger files, OCR, Office, AI, and longer jobs.

helper.pdfAndImages: PDF and image files up to {size}MB

errors.maxFiles: You can upload up to {count} files at a time.
errors.unsupportedType: {file} is not a supported file type.

auth.pleaseWait: Please wait while we complete your login

oauthCallback.saving: Saving the secure session and refreshing your account.
oauthCallback.redirecting: Your account is ready. Redirecting you back to PDF-Flow.
oauthCallback.errorMessage: The OAuth provider did not return the expected session details. Please start sign-in again.

loginNotices.registeredMessage: Your account is ready. Sign in to continue your PDF workflow.
loginNotices.registeredHint: Use the email and password you just registered.
loginNotices.oauthFailedMessage: The provider returned an error before PDF-Flow could complete sign-in.
loginNotices.oauthCallbackMessage: PDF-Flow did not receive the expected session details from the OAuth return.
loginNotices.oauthFailedHint: Try the provider again, or sign in with email and password if your account has one.

loginMarketing.heroTitle: Sign in and continue your PDF workflow
loginMarketing.heroDescription: Open recent jobs, continue OCR or conversion work, and check downloads from one account.
loginMarketing.panelDescription: Your tools, recent results, and account status stay connected so it is easier to pick up where you left off.

highlights.title: Recent results
highlights.description: Jump back to your latest processed files, downloads, and finished outputs.

highlights.title: Familiar tools
highlights.description: Continue OCR, conversion, merge, and other common PDF tasks without hunting for the next step.

highlights.title: Account and plan
highlights.description: Review your account status, plan access, and available processing capacity in one place.

registerMarketing.heroDescription: Create an account to manage document tasks, review results, and unlock advanced tools only when you actually need them.
registerMarketing.panelDescription: Your account keeps tools, recent activity, and plan access connected so the workflow feels more complete from the start.

highlights.title: Organized tools
highlights.description: Keep your core PDF tools, tasks, and results connected inside one account.

highlights.title: Recent progress
highlights.description: Return to your latest downloads and processed files with less friction.

highlights.title: Advanced features on demand
highlights.description: Use OCR, Office to PDF, and other cloud tools only when the job calls for them.

auth.passwordRecoverySubtitle: Enter your account email. If the account exists, we will send the next step.
auth.passwordRecoverySentMessage: If this email belongs to an active account, the next step has been sent.
auth.passwordRecoverySentHint: Check your inbox and spam folder before requesting another link.
auth.passwordRecoveryFailedMessage: We could not start password recovery. Please try again later.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Use your secure reset link to set a new password for this account.
auth.resetPasswordSuccessMessage: Your password has been changed. You can sign in with the new password now.
auth.resetPasswordSuccessHint: Return to sign in and continue your PDF workflow.
auth.resetPasswordFailedMessage: The reset link may be expired or invalid. Request a new link and try again.
auth.resetPasswordMissingMessage: Open this page from the latest password reset email, or request a new link.

recoveryMarketing.heroTitle: Recover access without changing your files
recoveryMarketing.heroDescription: Password recovery only updates account sign-in. Your documents, downloads, and plan status are not changed by the request.
recoveryMarketing.panelDescription: Reset links expire for account safety. Request a fresh link whenever you are unsure which one is current.

highlights.title: Private by default
highlights.description: The form does not reveal whether an email is registered.

highlights.title: Clear next step
highlights.description: After a request, check your inbox and continue from the newest reset email.

highlights.title: Safe retry
highlights.description: Expired or older links can be replaced by requesting a new one.

merge.title: Merge PDF
merge.desc: Combine multiple PDFs into one file

page.queueDesc: {pages} total pages. Drag the cards to adjust the final merge order.
page.actionDesc: Choose local or cloud processing. A new merged file will be generated when the task finishes.
page.successMessage: Successfully merged {count} PDF files with {pages} total pages.
page.errorMinFiles: Select at least 2 PDF files to merge.

split.title: Split PDF
split.desc: Extract pages or ranges from a PDF

page.setupDesc: Enter page ranges directly or open the visual selector for a clearer way to pick the pages you want to keep.
page.rangeHint: Separate single pages or ranges with commas. For example, 1-3,5 keeps pages 1, 2, 3, and 5.
page.actionTitle: Confirm the range, then generate a new file
actionTips: Confirm the page range before extracting.
For longer documents, the visual selector helps reduce typing mistakes.
A new PDF is created after processing. Your original file stays unchanged.
page.successMessage: The selected pages are ready to download.
page.errorLoad: Failed to load the PDF. Please reselect the file and try again.
page.errorNoRange: Enter the pages to extract, for example 1-3,5,7-9.
page.errorFailed: Failed to extract pages. Please try again later.
page.errorCloudFailed: Cloud extraction failed. Please try again later.

rotate.title: Rotate PDF
rotate.desc: Rotate PDF pages and export a new copy

page.setupDesc: Useful for scanned files, camera-made PDFs, or documents with inconsistent page orientation.
page.actionTitle: Confirm the angle, then generate a new file
actionTips: 90° and 270° are useful when pages are sideways.
A new PDF is generated after processing. The original file stays unchanged.
page.successMessage: Your rotated PDF is ready to download.
page.errorFailed: Rotation failed. Please try again later.
page.errorCloudFailed: Cloud rotation failed. Please try again later.

compress.title: Compress PDF
compress.desc: Reduce PDF file size when possible

page.setupDesc: Compression depends on how the PDF was built. The level changes the optimization pass, but actual savings are shown after processing.
page.estimateHint: The estimate helps choose a level, but the real size depends on the file. Actual results appear after processing.
page.noSavingsDesc: This PDF did not shrink further, so PDF-Flow kept the original file instead of creating a larger "compressed" copy.
page.optimizedDesc: A smaller PDF was generated with the selected setting.
page.errorFailed: Compression failed. Please try again later.
page.errorCloudFailed: Cloud compression failed. Please try again later.

qualityOptions.label: High quality
qualityOptions.description: Light optimization with a stronger focus on visual clarity.

qualityOptions.label: Balanced
qualityOptions.description: A steady middle ground for most sharing, archive, and upload workflows.

qualityOptions.label: Size first
qualityOptions.description: Prioritizes a smaller file size for uploads and fast distribution.

page.filesDesc: Organize the images you want to include, then choose the final page size and orientation.
page.outputDesc: Choose the PDF page size and orientation so the result fits printing, archiving, or sharing.
page.successMessage: Your images were successfully converted to a PDF and are ready to download.
page.errorFailed: Conversion failed. Please try again later.
page.errorCloudFailed: Cloud conversion failed. Please try again later.

page.outputDesc: PNG is better for clarity and fine detail, while JPEG is more suitable for smaller shareable files.
page.emptyHint: Choose an output format and start the conversion. The results will appear here page by page for quick review and download.
page.successCloud: Cloud conversion is complete. The result package has been downloaded as a ZIP file.
page.errorFailed: PDF to image conversion failed. Please try again later.
page.errorCloudFailed: Cloud conversion failed. Please try again later.

deletePages.title: Delete PDF Pages
deletePages.desc: Remove unwanted pages from a PDF

page.title: Delete PDF Pages
page.subtitle: Remove unwanted pages and create a clean new PDF.
page.setupDesc: Enter page ranges or open the visual selector to pick the pages you want to remove. Processing runs locally in your browser and never overwrites the original file.
page.rangeHint: Separate single pages or ranges with commas. Example: 2,4-6 removes pages 2, 4, 5, and 6.
page.outputTitle: Create a new file without those pages
outputTips: Useful for removing blank pages, scanning mistakes, duplicate pages, or pages you do not want to share.
The original PDF stays unchanged. A new result file is created.
To prevent mistakes, you cannot delete every page at once.
page.successMessage: Your new PDF is ready to download.
page.errorLoad: Could not read this PDF. Please choose the file again and try once more.
page.errorNoRange: Enter the pages to delete, for example 2,4-6,9.
page.errorNoPages: Select at least one page to delete.
page.errorAllPages: You cannot delete every page. Keep at least one page.
page.errorFailed: Failed to delete pages. Please check the page range and try again.

page.title: Organize PDF Pages
page.subtitle: Drag pages into the right order and export a new PDF.
page.workspaceDesc: Useful before submitting contracts, reports, or scanned files. Processing runs locally in your browser and never overwrites the original file.
page.outputTitle: Confirm the order, then create a new file
outputTips: Drag thumbnails to move pages directly.
On mobile or when dragging is inconvenient, use the move up and move down buttons.
The result keeps every page and only changes the order.
page.successMessage: Your new PDF is ready to download.
page.errorLoad: Could not read this PDF. Please choose the file again and try once more.
page.errorNoChange: The page order has not changed yet. Move at least one page before generating.
page.errorFailed: Failed to organize pages. Please choose the file again and try once more.
page.dragHint: Drag cards or use the move buttons

pageNumbers.title: Add PDF Page Numbers
pageNumbers.desc: Add page numbers to PDF files

page.title: Add PDF Page Numbers
page.subtitle: Add consistent page numbers to contracts, reports, and handouts.
page.setupDesc: Page numbers are written into a new PDF, which is useful before archiving, printing, submitting, or sharing a document.
page.outputTitle: Confirm the numbering, then create a new file
outputTips: Start numbering on a later page when the cover should stay unnumbered.
Use prefix and suffix text to match your document style.
Processing runs locally in your browser. The original file stays unchanged.
page.successMessage: Your numbered PDF is ready to download.
page.errorLoad: Could not read this PDF. Please choose the file again and try once more.
page.errorStartPage: The start page cannot be greater than the total number of PDF pages.
page.errorFailed: Failed to add page numbers. Please check the settings and try again.

page.title: Crop PDF
page.subtitle: Remove page edges, scan shadows, and extra whitespace for cleaner reading, printing, and sharing.
page.notice: Cropping only changes the visible PDF area. It is not secure redaction. Do not use it to hide ID numbers, phone numbers, or contract values; use a true redaction workflow for sensitive content.
page.uploadDescriptionIdle: Best for trimming whitespace, scan borders, and extra page edges. The original file is not modified.
page.uploadDescriptionReady: Set the top, right, bottom, and left crop margins to export a new copy.
page.dropSubtitle: or click to choose a file
page.previewHint: The preview confirms approximate margins; the exported PDF is the final result.
page.successMessage: Your new cropped PDF is ready to review.
page.localDesc: Cropping makes pages cleaner, but cropped content may still exist in the PDF structure. Use true redaction for sensitive information.
page.errorLoad: Could not read this PDF. Please choose the file again.
page.errorFailed: Failed to crop the PDF. Please check the margins and try again.

flatten.title: Flatten PDF
flatten.desc: Lock form appearance into a flat copy

page.title: Flatten PDF
page.subtitle: Turn fillable form fields into fixed page content for submission, archiving, and sharing.
page.notice: Flattening locks form appearance. It is not encryption, permission control, or secure redaction. Use a true redaction workflow for sensitive content.
page.uploadDescriptionIdle: Best for completed forms, applications, receipts, and confirmation files. The original file is not modified.
page.uploadDescriptionReady: A new copy will be generated with form fields fixed into the page appearance.
page.dropSubtitle: or click to choose a file
page.successMessage: Your new PDF copy is ready to review.
page.waitingBody: Upload a PDF and start flattening. Processing happens locally in your browser.
page.noFieldsBody: This PDF may already be ordinary page content. You can still download the processed copy, but the visible change may be small.
page.localDesc: Flattening helps reduce accidental field edits and improves stability across different PDF readers.
page.errorLoad: Could not read this PDF. Please choose the file again.
page.errorFailed: Failed to flatten the PDF. Please confirm this is a standard PDF.

page.title: Repair PDF
page.subtitle: Rebuild readable PDFs into cleaner copies that are easier to open and process.
page.notice: Repair uploads the PDF to the server so it can be read and exported again. It can help with light structure issues, unstable opening, or files that fail in other tools.
page.accessTitle: Sign in to repair readable PDF files
page.accessDescription: Repair needs cloud processing to parse PDF pages and export a fresh copy. Temporary files are cleaned by the cloud file lifecycle policy.
page.uploadDescriptionIdle: Useful for PDFs that open unstably, have structure issues, or fail in other processing tools.
page.uploadDescriptionSelected: The server will try to read available pages and export a new copy without overwriting the original.
page.dropSubtitle: or click to choose a file
page.noFile: Please upload a PDF file to repair first.
page.successMessage: Download the new copy and check that all pages are complete.
page.workspaceDescription: If a PDF fails while splitting, compressing, converting, or opening in a reader, try creating a clean copy first.
page.step1: Helps with light structure issues, cross-reference problems, and reader compatibility issues.
page.step2: If the file is encrypted, unlock it first. If pages cannot be read, this tool cannot recover the content.
page.step3: The result is a new file. Review page count, content, and layout after downloading.
page.errorFailed: The PDF could not be repaired. Please retry with a readable standard PDF file.

protect.title: Protect PDF
protect.desc: Add an opening password to a PDF

page.title: Protect PDF
page.subtitle: Add an opening password before sharing contracts, drafts, and sensitive documents.
page.notice: This tool uploads the PDF to the server to create a truly password-protected file. Download the result promptly; temporary files are cleaned by the cloud file lifecycle policy.
page.accessTitle: Sign in to create a protected PDF
page.accessDescription: Password protection needs cloud processing to rewrite the PDF security layer. After signing in, you can upload the file and download the protected result.
accessSteps: Upload the PDF and set a password
page.uploadDescriptionIdle: Standard PDF files are supported. Your original file will not be overwritten.
page.uploadDescriptionSelected: Confirm the password to create a new protected PDF.
page.dropSubtitle: or click to choose a file
page.passwordPlaceholder: At least 6 characters; letters and numbers recommended
page.mismatch: The two passwords do not match.
page.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
page.noFile: Please upload a PDF file first.
page.successMessage: The new PDF now requires the password to open.
page.workspaceDescription: Useful for external materials, contract drafts, and files you do not want opened accidentally.
page.step1: A separate copy is created; the original file is not modified.
page.step2: The password is only used for this processing request. Store it safely.
page.step3: Open the downloaded file once to confirm the password works.
page.errorFailed: The PDF could not be protected. Please retry with a standard PDF file.

unlock.title: Unlock PDF
unlock.desc: Create an unlocked copy with the known password

page.title: Unlock PDF
page.subtitle: Enter the password you already know and create an unlocked copy for organizing or archiving.
page.notice: This tool does not break unknown passwords. Use it only when you have permission to process the file and know the current password. The PDF is processed on the server and temporary files are cleaned by the cloud file lifecycle policy.
page.accessTitle: Sign in to unlock PDFs you are allowed to process
page.accessDescription: Unlocking needs cloud processing to read the encrypted PDF and export a fresh copy. Only process files you are authorized to handle.
accessSteps: Enter the password and download the copy
page.uploadDescriptionIdle: Upload a PDF that requires an open password. A normal PDF does not need unlocking.
page.uploadDescriptionSelected: Enter the current open password to create an unlocked copy.
page.dropSubtitle: or click to choose a file
page.passwordPlaceholder: Enter the password currently used by this PDF
page.noFile: Please upload a password-protected PDF first.
page.noPassword: Please enter the current PDF password.
page.successMessage: The new PDF copy no longer requires a password to open.
page.workspaceDescription: Useful for your own contracts, document packs, and archives before merging, splitting, numbering, or converting.
page.step1: You must know the current password. We do not guess, bypass, or break passwords.
page.step2: A new copy is exported; the original protected file is not overwritten.
page.step3: If the password is incorrect, the page will explain what to check before you try again.
page.guardBody: Only unlock files you are allowed to process. For third-party files, confirm authorization first.
page.errorFailed: The PDF could not be unlocked. Please confirm the password and retry with a standard protected PDF.

sign.title: Sign PDF
sign.desc: Add a visual signature to a PDF

page.title: Sign PDF
page.subtitle: Place a signature image on a PDF and create a signed copy for sharing or archiving.
page.notice: This is a visual signature/image stamp tool, not certificate-based digital signing. The PDF and signature image are processed locally in your browser.
page.pdfDescIdle: The original file is not overwritten; a new signed copy is exported.
page.pdfDescReady: Upload a signature image and adjust where it appears.
page.signDescIdle: PNG, JPG, and WEBP are supported.
page.signDescReady: Use the preview to adjust position and size.
page.dropSubtitle: or click to choose a file
page.previewTitle: The signature will appear in this area
page.previewHint: The preview confirms approximate placement; the exported PDF is the final result.
page.localDesc: Useful for contracts, forms, and receipts. Certificate-based legal digital signing should be handled by a separate signing workflow.
page.successMessage: Your new PDF copy with a visual signature is ready.
page.errorPdf: Could not read this PDF. Please choose the file again.
page.errorSignature: Please upload a signature image first.
page.errorFailed: Failed to sign the PDF. Please check the files and try again.

page.title: Extract PDF Text
page.subtitle: Export copyable text from PDFs with a text layer, ready for reports, contracts, notes, or AI prep.
page.notice: The file is read locally in your browser and is not uploaded. This extracts the PDF text layer; for scanned PDFs or image text, use OCR.
page.uploadTitleIdle: Choose the PDF to extract text from
page.uploadDescriptionIdle: Best for PDFs where text can already be selected and copied.
page.uploadDescriptionReady: The extracted text will appear here and can be copied or downloaded as TXT.
page.dropSubtitle: or click to choose a file
page.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please select the text manually.
page.emptyBody: This usually means the PDF is scanned, image-based, or specially encoded. Try OCR text recognition instead.
page.resultBody: Text is organized by page and ready to copy or download.
page.localBody: Text-based PDFs are usually faster locally because no upload is needed. Use OCR for scanned documents.
page.errorFailed: Text could not be extracted. Confirm this is a standard PDF or try OCR.

page.title: Extract PDF Images
page.subtitle: Pull embedded images from PDF pages for reuse, reporting, or archiving.
page.notice: The file is read locally in your browser and is not uploaded. This extracts embedded images; to export every full page as an image, use PDF to Image.
page.uploadTitleIdle: Choose the PDF to extract images from
page.uploadDescriptionIdle: Best for PDFs with embedded photos, illustrations, charts, or screenshots.
page.uploadDescriptionReady: Extracted images will appear for preview and download.
page.dropSubtitle: or click to choose a file
page.emptyHint: Upload a PDF and start extraction. Images will appear in the order they are found.
page.emptyBody: This PDF may be mostly text, vector graphics, or full-page scans. Use PDF to Image if you need full-page exports.
page.localTitle: Extract embedded images, not page screenshots
page.localBody: Unlike PDF to Image, this tries to recover the actual image resources inside the page.
page.errorFailed: Images could not be extracted. Confirm this is a standard PDF or use PDF to Image.

ocr.title: OCR Text Recognition
ocr.subtitle: Extract text from scanned PDFs and images with cloud OCR.
ocr.pageExtra: Cloud OCR is best for scans, photos, and image-heavy documents.
ocr.notice: Upload a PDF or image, choose a recognition language, and download the extracted text when the job completes.
ocr.accessGuestDescription: OCR uses cloud processing. Sign in first so the job can be attached to your account.
ocr.accessMemberDescription: OCR is a Pro workflow for longer, server-powered document processing.
ocr.uploadDescriptionIdle: Choose the document you want to recognize.
ocr.uploadDescriptionSelected: Review the language and start OCR.
ocr.dropSubtitle: PDF, PNG, JPG, and other common scan formats
ocr.workspaceDescription: Choose the best language for your document before starting recognition.

officeToPdf.title: Office to PDF
officeToPdf.pageNotice: Office conversion runs in the cloud for better format compatibility.
officeToPdf.accessGuestTitle: Sign in to convert Office files
officeToPdf.accessGuestDescription: Office conversion requires an account so the cloud job can be tracked.
officeToPdf.uploadDescriptionIdle: Choose a Word, Excel, or PowerPoint file.
officeToPdf.uploadDescriptionSelected: Review the selected file and start conversion.
officeToPdf.dropSubtitle: Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files are supported.
officeToPdf.workspaceDescription: Cloud conversion keeps complex Office layouts more stable.
officeToPdf.unsupported: Choose a Word, Excel, or PowerPoint file.
officeToPdf.conversionFailed: Office conversion failed. Please try again later.

watermark.title: Watermark PDF
watermark.desc: Add a text watermark to a PDF
watermark.localHint: Processed in your browser whenever possible; your file stays on your device for local tools.

page.setupDesc: Useful for contracts, reports, drafts, and shared files that need a clear but unobtrusive status mark.
outputTips: Keep the watermark short and easy to identify.
Higher opacity is more visible, while lower opacity is better for reading-heavy files.
A new PDF is generated after processing. Your original file remains unchanged.
page.localDesc: The watermark is applied locally in your browser, which fits quick status marks, review labels, and privacy-sensitive documents.
page.successMessage: Your watermarked PDF is ready to download.
page.errorFailed: Failed to apply the watermark. Please try again later.

fillForm.title: Fill PDF Form
fillForm.pageExtra: Cloud form filling is best for structured documents with recognizable fields.
fillForm.notice: Upload a PDF form, review detected fields, then generate a filled copy.
fillForm.accessGuestDescription: Form detection runs in the cloud and requires an account.
fillForm.accessMemberDescription: Form filling is a Pro workflow for structured document processing.
fillForm.uploadDescription: Choose a fillable or structured PDF form.
fillForm.dropSubtitle: PDF forms and structured PDFs are supported.
fillForm.workspaceDescription: Review detected fields before generating the filled document.
fillForm.noFieldsHelp: Try another PDF or check whether the form fields are embedded.

annotate.title: Annotate PDF
annotate.desc: Add notes and highlights to a PDF
annotate.pageExtra: Use cloud annotation when you need a generated PDF with visible notes or highlights.
annotate.notice: Upload a PDF, choose annotation type, set page and coordinates, then export a marked copy.
annotate.accessGuestDescription: Annotation generation runs in the cloud and requires an account.
annotate.accessMemberDescription: PDF annotation is a Pro workflow for server-generated document output.
annotate.uploadDescription: Choose the PDF you want to annotate.
annotate.workspaceDescription: Add visible text notes or highlight a rectangular area.
annotate.configureDescription: Set the annotation content, page, position, and color.
annotate.coordinateHintDescription: Coordinates use PDF page units. Start with small values and adjust after previewing the result.

htmlToPdf.title: HTML to PDF
htmlToPdf.desc: Convert public webpages or HTML text to PDF
htmlToPdf.notice: HTML rendering runs on the server with timeout and private-network protection. Public pages and pasted HTML are supported; logged-in webpages are not.
htmlToPdf.accessGuestTitle: Sign in to convert HTML to PDF
htmlToPdf.accessGuestDescription: Server-side rendering requires an account so the job can be tracked in your results center.
htmlToPdf.accessStep1: Provide a public URL or HTML text
htmlToPdf.inputDescription: Use a public http/https page, or paste a small HTML document that should become a PDF.
htmlToPdf.urlHint: Localhost, private IPs, intranet hosts, and logged-in pages are blocked.
htmlToPdf.htmlHint: Keep pasted HTML under the size limit. External assets may be blocked if they are private or slow.
htmlToPdf.optionsDescription: Choose a simple page format before starting the render job.
htmlToPdf.safety1: Rendering stops if the page takes too long.
htmlToPdf.safety2: Private network and local machine URLs are rejected.
htmlToPdf.safety3: Cookies and logged-in browser sessions are not used.
htmlToPdf.resultDescription: Download now or find this task later in Results Center.
htmlToPdf.errorFailed: HTML could not be converted. Check the URL, size, and page accessibility, then try again.

success.message: Thanks for upgrading. PDF-Flow is refreshing your account state.
success.checkoutReturned: Payment finished successfully. Your account will update shortly.
success.checkoutReturnedWithReference: Payment finished with a reference number. Keep it handy if support needs it.
success.accountPending: We will refresh your account once the page is ready.
success.accountSyncing: Refreshing your account so the latest subscription state is visible.
success.accountSynced: Your account details were refreshed. If Pro access does not appear immediately, wait a moment and refresh again.
success.accountGuest: You are not signed in on this browser. Sign in with the account used at checkout to see subscription status.
success.step1: Open your account to confirm the current plan and billing status.
success.step2: Try cloud OCR, Office conversion, or AI workflows when Pro access is visible.
success.step3: Contact support with the payment reference if access does not update after a few minutes.

cancel.message: Payment was closed before it finished. Your current plan stays unchanged, and you can restart whenever you are ready.
cancel.benefit4: Priority processing, email support, and account-level subscription controls.

account.deleteConfirm: Delete this account? This action cannot be undone.
account.workspaceDescription: Review your profile, plan, and usage state before returning to PDF work.
account.emptyMessage: We could not load a signed-in account for this page.
account.emptyHint: Sign in again or refresh the page if you expected to be logged in.
account.usageDescription: Usage is refreshed from your account service and may be delayed briefly after new work.
account.usageEmptyMessage: Once you process files while signed in, account usage appears here.
account.deleteDescription: Account deletion removes access to this account. Some security, billing, or audit records may remain as required.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this account?
deleteDialog.detailAccess: You will be signed out after the account is deleted.
deleteDialog.detailRetention: Security, billing, support, or audit records may remain where required.
deleteDialog.detailSignIn: This action cannot be undone from the account page.

account.updateFailedMessage: We could not save your profile changes. Please review the value and try again.
account.deleteFailedMessage: We could not delete this account right now. Please try again or contact support.

ai.title: AI PDF Analyzer
ai.pageExtra: AI analysis runs in the cloud and is best for long documents, summaries, Q&A, and structured extraction.
ai.notice: Upload a PDF, choose an AI task, and review the generated result before reusing it.
ai.accessGuestTitle: Sign in to use AI analysis
ai.accessGuestDescription: AI analysis requires an account so the document task can be processed securely.
ai.accessMemberDescription: AI analysis is a Pro workflow for server-powered document understanding.
ai.uploadDescriptionIdle: Choose a document for AI analysis.
ai.uploadDescriptionSelected: Select a task and run analysis.
ai.suggestedFlowDescription: Start with a summary, ask follow-up questions, then extract structured fields if needed.

batch.title: Batch analysis
batch.description: Run multiple analysis tasks at once to understand long documents faster.

summarize.label: Smart summary
summarize.description: Pull out core content and key points.

errors.batchFailed: Batch analysis could not be completed. Please try again later.

footer.brandDescription: Fast PDF tools for everyday work. Open a tool, add files, and keep the workflow moving.
footer.contactDescription: If something goes wrong, send a screenshot, the time it happened, and the action you tried. Do not send document contents unless support asks for them.
footer.trustPrivacyDescription: Common PDF jobs stay simple and predictable from the first click.
footer.trustWorkflowDescription: Tools stay close to the footer so repeat work starts faster.
footer.trustSupportDescription: Support prompts ask for context without requesting document contents.
footer.copyright: Simple PDF tools for everyday work.
footer.bottomLine: Free tools for daily work, Pro when you need more.

history.title: Results Center

page.title: Results Center
page.description: Review signed-in PDF jobs, check processing status, and download available results again before temporary files expire.

auth.title: Sign in to see your results
auth.description: Account history only shows jobs attached to your signed-in account. Anonymous local work stays on this device and is not merged here.

empty.title: No account jobs yet
empty.description: Run OCR, Office conversion, or other backend PDF jobs while signed in, then return here to review status and downloads.

errors.loadMessage: We could not load your result history. Please retry in a moment.
errors.downloadMessage: This result may have expired or is not available right now.

history.failedHint: {count} failed jobs are visible with short error details.

panel.confirmMessage: This removes the processing history saved in this browser. It does not affect downloaded files or documents on your device.
panel.emptyDescription: After processing PDFs, recent actions are saved in this browser so you can review file names, tool types, and processing time.

appShell.configUnavailableMessage: PDF-Flow could not reach the public configuration service. Core tools remain available with default settings.
appShell.configUnavailableHint: Retry once, or include this code if you contact support.
appShell.maintenanceMessage: The site is under maintenance. Please try again later.
appShell.maintenanceAdminHint: Admins can still sign in and adjust maintenance status from the control room.

feedbackWidget.title: Tell us what happened
feedbackWidget.description: We attach the page URL, browser context, and a diagnostic code. We do not ask for document contents.
feedbackWidget.titlePlaceholder: Example: PDF to image failed locally
feedbackWidget.messagePlaceholder: Write what you clicked, what you saw, and whether it happens again.
feedbackWidget.emailPlaceholder: Useful if we need to ask a follow-up
feedbackWidget.messageHint: Up to {count} characters. Prefer steps, visible errors, and expected result. Do not paste document contents.
feedbackWidget.privacyHint: Only troubleshooting context is attached; your PDF file contents are not included.
feedbackWidget.submitFailedMessage: The feedback service did not accept the report. Keep this diagnostic code and try again later.
feedbackWidget.successMessage: We received your feedback. Reference #{id}, diagnostic code {code}. Keep this if you need to add more context later.
feedbackWidget.copyFailed: Copy failed. You can still select the reference text manually.

validation.requiredMessage: Add a short title and the steps or visible error so we can locate the issue.
validation.requiredHint: A screenshot is useful, but please do not paste document contents.
validation.tooLongMessage: Keep the description under {count} characters and focus on reproduction steps.
validation.tooLongHint: Short reports are easier to triage.

availability.featureDisabledMessage: This PDF workflow is currently turned off by site settings. You can continue with other tools and try again later.
availability.featureDisabledHint: The tool entry is hidden while the feature flag is disabled. Admins can re-enable it from the control room.
availability.notFoundTitle: We could not find that page
availability.notFoundMessage: The requested path "{path}" does not match an available PDF-Flow route.
availability.notFoundHint: Return home or open the tools page to continue with an available tool.

privacy.title: How we protect your files and account information
privacy.description: PDF-Flow is an online PDF workspace for everyday document tasks. Core tools run locally in your browser whenever possible. Files are uploaded only when you choose OCR, Office conversion, AI analysis, or cloud processing.
privacy.summary: We do not sell your personal information or read your documents for advertising profiles. Cloud files are used only to complete the task you requested, provide downloads, troubleshoot issues, and protect service security, then removed under our temporary file lifecycle policy.
privacy.note: If you process highly sensitive, regulated, or legally binding documents, prefer local processing and assess whether cloud upload is appropriate.

sections.title: 1. Information we collect
paragraphs: When you visit the site, we may receive basic access data such as browser type, visit time, page path, language setting, IP-related security information, and error logs.
When you create or use an account, we store information needed to operate the service, including email, display name, hashed password, account role, subscription status, and login timestamps.
bullets: Account information: email, display name, authentication status, role, and permissions.
Operational information: task status, error codes, and necessary diagnostic logs.
Payment information: payment details are handled by the payment provider; PDF-Flow stores only necessary subscription status.

sections.title: 2. How files are processed
paragraphs: Basic tools such as merge, split, rotate, compress, image to PDF, and PDF to image are designed to run locally in your browser whenever possible.
OCR, Office to PDF, AI PDF analysis, and cloud-processing workflows require backend processing. When you submit these tasks, related files are uploaded temporarily.
bullets: Local processing: the server normally cannot see the document contents.
Cloud processing: the server temporarily receives files, generates results, and records necessary task status.
Support troubleshooting: avoid sending unnecessary sensitive files or full document contents in feedback.

sections.title: 3. Cloud file lifecycle policy
paragraphs: Cloud uploads, generated results, and temporary download bundles are stored in controlled temporary directories. Expired files are removed through automatic cleanup and admin maintenance tools.

Current defaults are about 1 hour for uploaded files and generated results, and about 30 minutes for download bundles. Actual deletion may be delayed by queues, load, troubleshooting, or maintenance windows.
bullets: Cleanup scope: temporary upload directories, generated result directories, and download bundle directories.
Not removed by file cleanup: accounts, audit logs, feedback, error summaries, and necessary task metadata.
Safety boundary: cleanup scans only configured temporary directories and deletes only system-generated paths with known prefixes.

sections.title: 4. How information is used
paragraphs: We use necessary information to provide login, file processing, task progress, downloads, permission checks, subscription recognition, troubleshooting, and security protection.
If you contact support, we may use screenshots, timestamps, error codes, page URLs, and steps you provide to locate the issue.

sections.title: 5. Retention and deletion
paragraphs: Temporary files are removed according to the lifecycle policy above. Redis file and job caches also use expiry times to avoid long-lived temporary access.
Account records, subscription status, required audit records, error summaries, and feedback reports may remain for reasonable security, billing, troubleshooting, and compliance purposes.

sections.title: 6. Your choices and rights
paragraphs: You may use some basic features without creating an account. For login, subscription, or cloud features, you decide whether to continue.
You may request access, correction, or deletion of account-related information. Some security, billing, audit, or troubleshooting records may need to remain for a reasonable period.

sections.title: 7. Security
paragraphs: We use hashed passwords, secure sign-in, role-based access, security logs, and least-necessary access practices to reduce risk.
No online service can be perfectly secure. If you handle highly sensitive files, consider local processing or redaction before upload.

sections.title: 8. Updates
paragraphs: As billing, team, enterprise API, or cloud features expand, this policy may change. Material updates will be reflected on this page.

sections.title: 9. Contact
paragraphs: For privacy, file-processing, or account-data questions, contact us through the support channel shown by the site. Include screenshots, timestamps, error codes, and short reproduction steps when reporting issues.

terms.title: Please understand these rules before using PDF-Flow
terms.description: These terms explain the basic rights, responsibilities, and limits that apply when you use PDF-Flow. We use plain language so important information is easier to understand.
terms.summary: You may use PDF-Flow to process legal documents that you own or are allowed to handle. Do not upload unlawful, infringing, malicious, abusive, or harmful content. Keep your own backups and verify important results.
terms.note: If you do not agree with these terms, please stop using features that require login, upload, cloud processing, or subscription.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance
paragraphs: By accessing, registering, signing in, or continuing to use PDF-Flow, you agree to the current Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
We may update these terms as the product, legal requirements, or operations change. Updated terms will be shown on this page.

sections.title: 2. Accounts and security
paragraphs: You are responsible for your account, credentials, and activity under your account. Use a secure password and do not share access with unauthorized people.
If you notice suspicious account activity, billing issues, or unknown tasks, contact us through the support channel promptly.
bullets: Do not impersonate another person when registering or using the service.
Do not bypass permissions, plan limits, upload limits, or security controls.
Do not attempt to access private admin areas, private APIs, or other users data.

sections.title: 3. Files and content responsibility
paragraphs: You confirm that you have the legal right to upload, convert, recognize, analyze, or download the files you use with PDF-Flow.

You should keep your own originals and backups, and review results before relying on them. Conversion, compression, OCR, and AI analysis can be affected by file quality, format, language, browser environment, and third-party dependencies.

sections.title: 4. Prohibited use
paragraphs: To protect the service and other users, you may not use PDF-Flow for unlawful, infringing, fraudulent, harassing, malicious, abusive, or access-control-bypassing activity.
If we detect suspicious requests, malicious files, resource abuse, or high-risk behavior, we may limit uploads, stop tasks, suspend accounts, or refuse part of the service.
bullets: Do not upload viruses, attack scripts, or disguised malicious files.
Do not scrape APIs in bulk, bypass rate limits, or consume abnormal resources.
Do not process copyrighted, private, or regulated content that you have no right to handle.

sections.title: 5. Subscriptions and feature limits
paragraphs: Some advanced features may require login, Pro, or enterprise access. Feature availability, quotas, prices, refunds, and cancellation rules follow the purchase or payment flow shown at the time.
We may adjust plan boundaries, quotas, and feature availability as the product evolves. Material changes should be communicated clearly.

sections.title: 6. Availability and limits
paragraphs: We work to keep the service stable, but we cannot guarantee every file, format, browser, network, or third-party dependency will work at all times.
Maintenance, upgrades, dependency failures, network issues, security events, or force majeure may interrupt or slow the service.

sections.title: 7. Disclaimer
paragraphs: PDF-Flow is a document-processing tool. It does not provide legal, financial, medical, or professional review advice. AI analysis, OCR, and conversion results may contain errors or omissions.
For contracts, invoices, identity documents, compliance materials, or other critical files, review results yourself and seek professional confirmation when needed.

sections.title: 8. Changes, suspension, and termination
paragraphs: If an account violates these terms, harms service security, infringes rights, or causes clear resource abuse, we may restrict, suspend, or terminate related accounts and tasks.
You may stop using the service or request account deletion where supported. Some security, billing, audit, and troubleshooting records may remain for a reasonable period.

sections.title: 9. Contact
paragraphs: For questions about these terms, accounts, subscriptions, or file results, contact us through the support channel shown by the site. Include screenshots, timestamps, error codes, and short reproduction steps for technical issues.

workspace.title: PDF tools you can open and use right away
workspace.description: Merge, compress, split, convert, OCR, and analyze PDFs from one focused workspace.
workspace.noResultsHint: Try another keyword or switch back to all categories.
workspace.advancedDescription: OCR, Office conversion, AI analysis, form filling, and annotation sit together as the upgrade path.
workspace.disabledFallback: This feature is currently under maintenance.
trust: Common PDF actions stay easy to find and quick to open.
Advanced document tasks live in one clearly marked area.
Tool groups stay readable without repeated upgrade tags.

privacy.title: Free tools
privacy.description: Common PDF jobs stay easy to open and scan.

speed.title: Faster entry
speed.description: Frequent tools are easy to scan and open directly.

free.title: Clean plan levels
free.description: Advanced tools are grouped instead of tagged everywhere.

toolDescriptions.ocr: Recognize text from scans, image PDFs, and photos
toolDescriptions.aiAnalyzer: Summarize, ask questions, and extract structured data from PDFs

page.heroTitle: PDF work that stays clear from upload to export
page.heroDescription: PDF-Flow keeps everyday edits, heavier cloud jobs, and account history in one focused workspace, so each document task starts in the right place.

pillars.title: Everyday PDF actions
pillars.body: Merge, split, compress, rotate, convert, watermark, number pages, and extract content without turning the page into a maze.

pillars.title: Advanced work when needed
pillars.body: OCR, Office conversion, AI analysis, forms, and annotation are available for jobs that need more processing power or a signed-in workspace.

pillars.title: A workflow, not a directory
pillars.body: Tool pages focus on the current task, while history, account state, plan access, and exports stay connected around the work.

page.workflowDescription: The product separates choosing a tool from doing the work. Features explain the system; the tools page is where files move.
workflowSteps: Choose the kind of work from the tools page or continue from recent activity.
Use focused controls for the current file instead of scanning a second catalog.
Export, download, or return to account history when the job is done.

trustItems.title: Clear access states
trustItems.body: Free, Pro, account-required, and unavailable states are shown where they matter.

trustItems.title: Private by default where possible
trustItems.body: Local tools stay in the browser, while cloud tools explain when sign-in or upload is required.

trustItems.title: Room to grow
trustItems.body: The same structure can support larger files, team workflows, and advanced processing without cluttering the basics.

page.ctaTitle: Start with the tool you need
page.ctaDescription: Go to the tools page for the full list of actions, or review pricing when advanced workflows become part of your routine.

page.title: Choose the plan that matches how often you work with PDFs
page.description: Free covers everyday PDF actions. Pro adds advanced document tools for people who work with PDFs often.
page.freeDescription: For occasional PDF work such as merging, splitting, rotating, and lightweight compression.
page.proDescription: For frequent document work, OCR / Office / AI tasks, form filling, annotation, and heavier jobs.
page.enterpriseDescription: For teams that need shared access, workflow integration, permissions, or delivery support.
page.cloudBody: Pick Free for simple, occasional PDF tasks. Pick Pro when advanced tools or repeated document work are part of your routine.
page.promiseTitle: Pro is for regular PDF work
page.promiseBody: Keep the free plan for occasional tasks. Choose Pro when OCR, Office conversion, AI analysis, forms, annotation, or bigger document workflows become routine.
page.ctaTitle: Start free, upgrade when you need Pro
page.ctaBody: Use Free for everyday PDF actions. Move to Pro when advanced tools become part of your normal workflow.
page.authHint: Sign in to upgrade or view your current plan.
